description_long: This is a yellow metal guard rail designed for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or event spaces. The structure consists of a horizontal top rail and bottom rail, connected by evenly spaced vertical bars, all with rounded edges for safety. The guard rail stands on two wide, flat feet that provide stability and prevent tipping. The metal surface appears to be powder-coated or painted for weather resistance and visibility. The design is simple and functional, with no decorative elements or reflective markings. The ends of the rail are smoothly curved, minimizing sharp edges and enhancing safety.
description: A yellow metal guard rail with vertical bars and rounded corners, supported by two flat feet for stability. The surface is smooth and painted for visibility and weather resistance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, vertical bars, and rounded corners of the guard rail.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile and the flat, wide feet extending perpendicular to the rail.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the vertical bars and overall structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the base feet.
